content.en:
The Dao Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple investigated in the Dao Mountain Realm, and found that many Chaos Continents and Universes had disappeared.

In fact, some small forces also know about these things, but some universes and the Chaos Continent are not big things at all, so no one cares.

But now it is different, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple came to investigate in person, and those forces who took refuge in the Ten Thousand Domains Temple reported the disappearance of the universe and the Chaos Continent, thus attracting the attention of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

"A large number of universes and chaos continents have disappeared, and they are basically universes and chaos continents with remote territories!"

Half Moon Daozu frowned.

Obviously, this is someone who is constantly devouring the universe and the Chaos Continent to improve their strength.

But under normal circumstances, it would be useless for Dao Ancestors to devour the Universe and the Chaos Continent.

But since that person was constantly devouring the universe and the Chaos Continent, it was not an interest, it must be cultivated with the help of this method.

"It's strange, I haven't heard of any Dao Ancestor who will devour the universe and the Chaos Continent to cultivate!"

Half Moon Dao Ancestor wondered.

Although he didn't know who the enemy was, it was naturally impossible for the Half Moon Dao Ancestor to just forget it.

He kept sending people to track down the mysterious man, and once any of the enemy's universes or Chaos Continents disappeared, he immediately sealed off that territory.

It's a pity that the enemy's speed is too fast, and the people of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple haven't tracked it down once.

But as time passed, more and more universes disappeared, more and more chaotic continents disappeared, and the mysterious man seemed to have more and more courage, which attracted the attention of many forces.

After all, for many big forces, those universes and chaos continents in the Dao Mountain Realm are also one of the sources of geniuses, and if there are enough of them, they can also provide many geniuses.

As a result, the mysterious man's actions angered many forces.

Black Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian entered the Black Wind Mountain for the first time as a Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor and started a meeting with the other half-step domain ancestors.

To Ye Tian's surprise, the content of this meeting turned out to be about the mysterious Dao Ancestor who devoured the universe.

Ye Tian was shocked, such a thing should not be very important, it would actually attract the attention of Black Wind Mountain, and there were so many half-step domain ancestors to hold a meeting.

This meeting also came a Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, that is, the Flame Crack Dao Ancestor.

There were a total of eleven Dao Ancestors who participated in the meeting, including the Eternal Dao Ancestor, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, and the Gengjin Dao Ancestor that Ye Tian was more familiar with.

For Ye Tian, the invincible Dao Ancestor, to participate in such a meeting, no one would give an opinion.

Everyone knew that Ye Tian fought against the five great half-step domain ancestors alone, and there were even top half-step domain ancestors like the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, and he also killed two half-step domain ancestors, which was second only to the Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors like the Yan Crack Dao Ancestor.

How dare they, these ordinary half-step domain ancestors, question Ye Tian, isn't that slapping themselves in the face!

The meeting opened, and the Flame Crack Dao Ancestor spoke: "Recently, a mysterious Dao Ancestor has appeared that is constantly devouring the universe and the Chaos Continent, and even in some of the territories controlled by our Black Wind Mountain, many of the Universe and Chaos Continent have disappeared. To the outside world, this is not a big deal, after all, no Dao Ancestor has fallen. But after our investigation, this matter is not simple!"

"No matter how simple it is, it's just some ordinary universes and chaotic continents!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke.

"What if this involves devouring the Clan?"

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor said solemnly.

Some half-step domain ancestors were a little stunned when they heard that they devoured the clan, and they didn't know what this meant, but when the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor heard this, their expressions suddenly changed drastically.

The two of them were also extremely ancient half-step domain ancestors, so they had heard of the Devouring Clan, and they also knew what this clan represented.

"Devouring a clan is a legend, how can there really be a devouring clan in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor questioned.

"Look at this!"

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor took out a black scale the size of a thumb, which presented a relatively rare rule, which seemed to be able to devour energy, and at this moment, it was constantly devouring the surrounding vitality.

"This is the scales that devour the Clan?"

The Eternal Dao Ancestor recognized it.

"That's right!" Yan Crack Dao Ancestor nodded, "Not long ago, there was a fluctuation somewhere in the Dao Mountain Realm, I immediately went to check it, and the other party left early, and did not leave any breath or clues. But the other party should have just broken through the realm and left this fragment of scales behind. And this fragment is the scale of the body surface of the devouring clan, and the other party is estimated to have left in too haste, so he didn't have time to dispose of it. "

"The Devouring Clan appeared, that's a big trouble!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor frowned.

"What is the Devourer?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor explained, "The Devouring Clan is a special race in the Divine Heaven Realm, and it is rumored that in a long time ago, a world was born with self-consciousness and began to evolve towards living beings. Since no one bothered with its evolution, it eventually took the world as its ontology and formed into a humanoid being, and was able to cultivate. Eventually, it became a domain ancestor, and devoured many universes, worlds, and Chaos continents, and also selected a number of potential worlds to help them transform. This group of world shapeshifters is called the Devouring Clan, so they like to devour the world, the universe, and the Chaos Continent, and even if they grow to the peak, they will even swallow the domain realm! Fortunately, the Devouring Clan does not dislike devouring the world by itself, so they will not bother to cultivate more clansmen, and there will only be a hundred clansmen at the peak. But the growth of each Devouring Clan is accompanied by the fall of countless worlds and the death of countless living beings! In the end, a group of Domain Ancestors besieged and killed the Devouring Clan, and finally paid an incomparably heavy price to exterminate the Devouring Clan! Since then, the Devouring Clan has completely disappeared, and only exists in the classics of the major forces!"

"Devouring World Evolution, there is such a race!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

At this moment, he also understood why Black Wind Mountain was nervous.

Because once the Devouring Clan grows up, even the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will probably be devoured, and the small realm of the Black Wind Mountain will probably also be devoured.

"Flame Crack Dao Ancestor, can you tell what realm that Devouring Clan powerhouse is in based on this scale?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Half-step domain ancestor level!"

The Flame Splitting Dao Ancestor judged: "And it should have just broken through to the half-step domain ancestor level, it has devoured too many universes and chaos continents, and no one has paid attention to it, if it is in the Divine Heaven Realm, it will not have a chance to devour so many universes and chaos continents at all!"

The devouring clan at the half-step domain ancestor level, this is already very dangerous, once you make further progress, you can become a half-step domain ancestor of the realm of all things, it will be difficult to kill the other party, if you make further progress, become a half-step domain ancestor of the one realm, it will be a real disaster!

"It's imperative to find this Devourer and kill him!"

Flame Crack Dao Ancestor ordered.
